title: Oven pride Daily Degreaser 500ml
features: Tackles tough grease & leaves surfaces sparkling
description: Product description Use daily in your oven, including the glass door to prevent tough build up and extend the time between deep cleaning. It's great for greasy hobs, extractors & kitchen surfaces too. Contains malodour technology to help eliminate unpleasant kitchen smells. For a deep clean why not try our Oven Pride Deep Cleaner, the No1 oven cleaner brand. Ingredients 5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Phosphates, Cationic Surfactants, Also contains: Perfumes Manufacturer Contact Information McBride Plc, Middleton Way, Middleton, Manchester, M24 4DP. See more
